# Tested Projects Fixtures

This directory contains source-only snapshots of real-world Python projects used
for PCResolve regression and provenance validation.

Only Python source files are kept:

- `.py`
- `.pyi`

Non-source assets such as datasets, notebooks, images, PDFs, generated files,
cache files, and project-local build artifacts are intentionally omitted. These
fixtures are used for static analysis tests, so runtime completeness is not
required.
